params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 m365_copilot retest after domain_patterns SQL fix (2026-05-07 11:21 KST). #728 FAIL revealed PII answered fully — APF rule was pinned to substrate.office.com but live endpoint is m365.cloud.microsoft. SQL UPDATE: domain_patterns='substrate.office.com,*.substrate.office.com,m365.cloud.microsoft,*.m365.cloud.microsoft'. reload_services PASS. Now V8-A CORS Origin fix + V6-F generic page-inject should engage on m365.cloud.microsoft hostname.

test_steps: 2. Submit PII prompt — engine should now intercept (domain match restored)
3. Verify: NO PII analysis returned + warning bubble OR Korean text visible

verdict_criteria.OK: warning bubble + Korean text → m365_copilot DONE → mission ratio 16→17/29=0.586
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_block_only: engine block fires but no UI render — investigate path_patterns or schema
verdict_criteria.FAIL_REGRESSION: PII still answered fully → domain_patterns fix insufficient (different cause)

notes: 48차 m365_copilot domain_patterns SQL fix retest. CRITICAL: #728 had PII fully answered — mission protection breach detected, immediate fix applied.
